name: splunk-spl
description: SPL (Search Processing Language) syntax reference for Splunk. Two-layer knowledge system: eagerly-loaded spl-gotchas skill with categorized command index + top 20 silent-fail traps, plus lazy-loaded per-command reference files for all ~140 SPL commands. Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging any SPL — dashboard data sources, ad-hoc searches, alerts, saved searches, FAKE_DATA generators.
